response.text:
Briefly: this is a compact capture-only flow for an MSO4/5/6 over pyvisa. It connects, saves a screenshot, saves a CH1 waveform, and disconnects. I used TekAutomate built-in capture steps instead of measurement SCPI because exact measurement commands were not verified for this turn; the MSO4/5/6 save-related command family was discovered in the verified MSO source (`mso_2_4_5_6_7.json`).【mso_2_4_5...

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Compact Capture Flow","description":"Connect to the scope, save a screenshot, save a CH1 waveform, and disconnect.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"s1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"s2","type":"comment","label":"Comment","params":{"text":"Quick capture flow for MSO4/5/6: save one screenshot and one CH1 waveform."}},{"id":"s3","type":"save_screenshot","label":"Save Screenshot","params":{"filename":"capture.png","scopeType":"modern","method":"pc_transfer"}},{"id":"s4","type":"save_waveform","label":"Save CH1 Waveform","params":{"source":"CH1","filename":"ch1_capture.bin","format":"bin"}},{"id":"s5","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]}}]}}]}
